 \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \-  \- 

**For your consideration**  
Most recently, I’ve been working as a Designer at YellowBridge and a Front-End Developer with Creative Assembly, creating cohesive landing pages and cross-promotional social assets that support marketing initiatives and align with campaign goals and brand standards across digital touchpoints. Prior to that, I worked in product design with BNY Mellon, where I helped refine a Figma design library to integrate with Storybook and learned Next.js while contributing to a reporting dashboard used by several top banks. I also partnered on evolving a Figma component library alongside new brand guidelines, ensuring ADA compliance while unifying and modernizing the client experience through thoughtful transitions, animations, and collaboration with content creators producing branded assets. Alongside professional work, I maintain a personal design system & component library to better understand how to prioritize functional, visual, and technical needs across different types of design projects.  
Tech Stack  
Design Tools: Figma, Photoshop, Illustrator, Lightroom,  After Effects, InVision  
Front-End Development: HTML5, CSS3/SASS, JavaScript (ES6+), Vue.js, React.js, Angular.js, Node.js    
UX/UI Frameworks: Bootstrap, Material UI, Tailwind CSS    
CI/CD: GitHub, GitKraken, SourceTree, AWS, Docker, Adobe Experience Manager  
Team Project: Jira, FigJam, Slack, Teams, Trello, Asana, Salesforce, Analytics, OBS, Discord  
 Experience  
**Experience**  
YellowBridge — Pittsburgh, PA (contract remote)   
 Designer \~ Apr 2025 – Oct 2025  \- Landing Page design & Social campaign assets with Figma & Adobe XD

Creative Assembly — Pittsburgh, PA (contract remote)   
 Frontend Developer \~ Feb 2024 – Aug 2024  \- Landing Page & Design System Styling with [Vue.js](http://Vue.js) \+ SASS

 BNY Mellon — Pittsburgh, PA (hybrid)  
  Sr. UX Product Designer, Investment Management \~ Jan 2023 – Feb 2024  
  \- Created a prototype to streamline client pathways and library enhancements on account management.  
  \- Worked with clients & stakeholders to understand areas that could be improved with better or simpler design patterns.  
  \- Collaborated with developers to understand the lift and scope as well as impact on wider shared services.  
  \- Organized team research & planning tests of qualitative and quantitative research heuristics with prototypes and QA environments.  
  \- Assisted in the building out of a global component library in Figma using new variable and display modes with ADA requirements.  
  \- Coordinated and implemented project roadmaps, component library (QC) checklists, and planned features in Kanban/Scrum/Agile boards.  
  \- Led UX design efforts to modernize consumer banking apps, simplifying transfers, automated user flows for reporting/tracking paths.

TwitchTV Partner Designer – (remote) Merch Branding / Discord / Content Assets \~ July 2022  – Aug 2024

Joel Dombek Design — Pittsburgh, PA (freelance)  
Branding, Design \+ Development, Social \~ Dec 2024 – Oct 2025  
  \- Created brand designs and development solutions for myself and independent content creators.

ConnectiveRX — Pittsburgh, PA (hybrid) UI/x & Frontend Developer \~ August 2018 – May 2022  
Dick’s Sporting Goods — Pittsburgh, PA Digital Designer & Front-End Developer \~ August 2015 – April 2018  
Giant Eagle — Pittsburgh, PA  Front-End Developer & Designer \~ October 2014 \- March 2015  
Agency 1903 — Pittsburgh, PA (hybrid)  Front-End Developer & Designer  / UI / QA \~ February 2014 \- December 2014  
Arsenal Studios— Pittsburgh, PA (remote) UX Designer / Front-end Developer / QA / Motion Graphics \~ February 2013 \- December 2013  
Entercom Corp. —  Pittston, PA Branding / Web Development / Social \~ May 2017 – July 2018  
Content Factory —  Pittsburgh, PA Branding / Web Development / Social \~ April  2015 – February 2016  
ProActive Clinic —  Portland, OR (remote)  Photography Branding Site \~ August 2014 \- December 2014  
Medcom Solutions — Pittsburgh, PA  Web Design / Development \~ March 2013 \- September 2013  
Peace by Piece — Toronto, Canada (remote) \~ Logo Design & Web Design \~ March 2012  
Maniac Magazine — Pittsburgh, PA \~ Site Redesign & Styling \~ March 2012  
Guaranteed Results Marketing— Pittsburgh, PA Web Designer / Developer \~ July 2011 \- June 2012  
Morning Hockey —  Pittsburgh, PA \~ Logo Design Embroidery \~ March 2011  
Envelope Service — Chester, WV Graphic Designer / Print Production \~ March 2008 \- January 2011  
CommonWealth Press —  Pittsburgh, PA \~ Screen Printing / Design \~ 2006 & 2007
